backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the blinking cursor color in the typing test was updated to amber/yellow in frontend/src/index.css, with high confidence tied to test REQ-8.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of key frontend files, noting the amber/yellow cursor blink color update in index.css, Tailwind config details, and App.tsx typing test implementation fixes.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining light and dark mode OKLCH CSS custom properties for the shadcn-ui design system, with no app-specific styles.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Typing Speed Test app, mounting the React app at the #root div and loading main.tsx as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component implementing a full typing speed test with random paragraph selection, 60-second timer, real-time WPM/CPM/accuracy tracking, character highlighting, results overlay, and restart functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context, provider, and hook for Internet Identity authentication via @dfinity/auth-client, exposing login/logout, identity state, and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet with OKLCH dark navy/cyan design system, custom fonts (Inter + JetBrains Mono), character highlight classes for the typing test, glassmorphism utilities, gradient background, and keyframe animations including an amber/yellow blinking cursor for .char-current.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH color tokens, custom border radii, glow box shadows, and accordion animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 5) for a single-file vanilla HTML/CSS/JS typing speed test app, listing existing features, architectural notes, and requirement mappings. Includes features like random paragraph display, 60-second timer, real-time WPM/CPM/accuracy, character highlighting, results screen, restart button, responsive design, and a custom cursor color.
